title: lappula ketmenica
intro: Lappula ketmenica, also known as Ketmen Mountain blue thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lappula ketmenica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine in Central Asia.
